economic_notes: GBEs: Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd. (20% interest, currently active), Stautw Property Development Corporation, Tkian Development Corporation. Nation is economically dependent on Indigenous Services Canada funding.
notes: Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Salish Strait Seafoods Ltd. (20% interest), Stautw Property Development Corporation, Tkian Development Corporation - only Salish Strait Seafoods is currently active. Ottawa Trust Funds of $583,799 are held by the federal government. Deferred revenue was $440,000 in prior year and nil in current year, with $440,000 recognized as revenue in 2023. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + FNHA + FNGST = 6,438,853 + 1,386,912 + 2,162,600 = 10,150,221 (does not include property taxation or CMHC/other transfers not separately identified). Replacement and Operating Reserves of $2,482,293 included in liabilities. No schedule of remuneration provided in the excerpt.
